title: Mildly Citrusy Norwegian Fish Wrap
description: A light and indulgent Norwegian dish featuring Italian seasoning and citrus flavors, wrapped in a corn husk, perfect for a quick lunch. This recipe is FODMAP-friendly and easy to make.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Rinse the cod fillets and pat them dry with paper towels.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
Place the cod fillets in a large baking dish and brush the citrus mixture evenly over both sides of the fish.
Simmer the fish in the oven for 12 minutes or until it flakes easily with a fork.
While the fish is cooking, prepare the corn husks by soaking them in water for 5 minutes.
To assemble the wraps, place a cooked fish fillet in the center of each corn husk.
Sprinkle chopped parsley and orange zest over the top of each fish fillet.
Fold the sides of the corn husk over the filling and roll up the wrap to form a tight cylinder.
Serve the wraps hot and enjoy.
